description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: This document defines the steps to deposit assets from the ALM Proxy to the ERC-4626 vault to receive yield-bearing shares.

The process for depositing to ERC-4626 Tokens on destination blockchain through the `ForeignController` contract is the same as the one for depositing to ERC-4626 Tokens on Ethereum Mainnet through the `MainnetController` contract; see [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.2.1.2.1.2.2.1 - General Deposit to ERC-4626 Tokens Procedure](862f4064-47e5-4f76-908d-64edfcfe0ddd).
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.
